evals.prompt: You are in the NoteXT repository at C:/Users/Wyofa/projects/NoteXT. Produce two attractive dark-themed draw.io architecture diagrams for this project: one portfolio-friendly (for recruiters, scannable in ~10 seconds), and one detailed (for collaborators or AI onboarding, showing layers, routes, jobs, integrations, and data). Swimlane-organized, tech stack badges, capability highlights. Save them under the output directory you were given. Also write a .daemonstrate-state.json sidecar so a future incremental run can diff.
evals.expected_output: Two valid .drawio XML files + a state JSON. Portfolio is coarse (capability pills, tech badges). Detailed has 6+ layers with key nodes, files, and cross-layer edges.
